fields.delivery_address: 1247 Ocean View Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90802
fields.icd_conflict_detail: All three documents (referral form, clinical notes, and prescription) consistently list ICD-10 code G12.21 with the description 'Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.' No conflict was found across any of the documents.
fields.priority_reason: Patient has a confirmed diagnosis of Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), a severe progressive neurological condition, which classifies this case as high clinical risk requiring urgent DME fulfillment.
fields.notes: 1) Diagnosis of ALS (G12.21) is a serious progressive neurodegenerative disease; however, the clinical notes describe the treatment as 'injection therapy' and 'physical therapy,' which are atypical for ALS and more consistent with an orthopedic or musculoskeletal injury — this clinical narrative inconsistency warrants physician clarification. 2) The referral was submitted by Robert Campos, who is listed as both the insurance adjuster and the case manager, which is an unusual dual role and should be verified. 3) The prescription is valid for 90 days from 03/11/2026, expiring on 06/09/2026. 4) No preferred appointment window, transportation requirements, or interpreter needs were specified. 5) A standard manual wheelchair (E1161) is ordered for a patient with ALS; given the progressive nature of ALS, a power wheelchair evaluation may be warranted in the near future and should be flagged for follow-up.

kg_validation.source: CMS ICD-10-CM Official Guidelines for Coding and Reporting, FY2026

email_body:
Dear Mr. Campos,

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out regarding a pending durable medical equipment (DME) referral for your patient, **Willie Brooks**, under claim number **WC-2026-084495**.

In reviewing the referral, we have identified several required fields that are currently incomplete. We are unable to advance routing on this claim until the following information has been provided:

- **Appointment Window** *(Hard Block — routing is currently on hold pending this information)*
- **Transportation**
- **Language**

We kindly ask that you supply the missing details within **24 business hours** of receiving this message to avoid any further delays in processing and fulfilling the referral for Mr. Brooks.

Please reply directly to this email or contact our intake team at your earliest convenience. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and look forward to your response.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Warm regards,

**Coastal DME Intake Agent**
Coastal DME Intake Department
